name: spidops
flavor_texts: It clings to branches and ceilings using its threads and moves without a sound. It takes out its prey before the prey even notices it.
Spidops covers its territory in tough, sticky threads to set up traps for intruders.
text: Spidops is the Trap Pokémon. It is a bug-type Pokémon. Abilities: insomnia, stakeout (hidden). Base stats — HP: 60, Attack: 79, Defense: 92, Sp. Atk: 52, Sp. Def: 86, Speed: 35. Evolution line: tarountula → spidops. Lore: It clings to branches and ceilings using its threads and moves without a sound. It takes out its prey before the prey even notices it. Spidops covers its territory in tough, sticky threads to set up traps for intruders.
